closedFindings.title: Review extractor does not normalize canonical `file:line` evidence before classification and status checks
closedFindings.description: `normalizePathCandidate()` preserves a trailing `:line`, so `determineStatus()` checks a nonexistent path and the emitted review map can mark a real file as missing when fed the documented review delta shape.

transitions.reason: Stripped trailing `:NNN`/`:NNN-NNN` line-anchor suffix in normalizePathCandidate() (extract-from-evidence.cjs:418-421) before classification/status checks.

closedFindings.resolution: Stripped trailing `:NNN`/`:NNN-NNN` line-anchor suffix in normalizePathCandidate() (extract-from-evidence.cjs:418-421) before classification/status checks.

closedFindings.title: Packet closure artifacts overstate strict-validation completion despite recorded failure
closedFindings.description: the task list marks `T035` complete, while the implementation summary records `T035` as `FAIL (exit 2)` and the spec still treats `validate.sh --strict` exit 0 as a handoff/success criterion.

transitions.reason: Reconciled T035 status — downmarked tasks.md:90 to [ ] with DEFERRED note citing pre-existing out-of-scope drift; implementation-summary.md _memory.continuity.status → "conditional".

closedFindings.resolution: Reconciled T035 status — downmarked tasks.md:90 to [ ] with DEFERRED note citing pre-existing out-of-scope drift; implementation-summary.md _memory.continuity.status → "conditional".

closedFindings.title: Focused Vitest coverage never exercises the canonical review `file:line` finding shape
closedFindings.description: the review-shape fixture only uses path-only `file` values, so the documented prompt-pack example that writes `file":"path:line"` can regress without the extractor test suite noticing.

transitions.reason: Added new vitest case `it("strips :line and :line-range suffixes ...")` in resource-map-extractor.vitest.ts asserting MISSING→OK after normalization; 3/3 tests pass.

closedFindings.resolution: Added new vitest case `it("strips :line and :line-range suffixes ...")` in resource-map-extractor.vitest.ts asserting MISSING→OK after normalization; 3/3 tests pass.

closedFindings.title: Command docs still describe root-level `review/` and `research/` outputs instead of the resolved `{artifact_dir}` packet path for nested specs
closedFindings.description: child-phase packets emit `resource-map.md` and `review-report.md` under `review/{packet}/`, but the command docs still promise root-level locations that only hold for root specs.

transitions.reason: Updated deep-review.md and deep-research.md §1 PURPOSE + §2 CONTRACT to describe {artifact_dir} resolution (root vs nested child-phase) via resolveArtifactRoot().

closedFindings.resolution: Updated deep-review.md and deep-research.md §1 PURPOSE + §2 CONTRACT to describe {artifact_dir} resolution (root vs nested child-phase) via resolveArtifactRoot().
